allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; ts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(ts\)} tournaments'\); print\(ts[0]['id'] if ts else 'none'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; ps=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(ps\)} players'\); [print\(f'  {p[\\"id\\"]} {p[\\"name\\"]} tier={p[\\"membershipTier\\"]}'\) for p in ps[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('durationHours:', d.get\('durationHours'\), 'remainingMinutes:', d.get\('remainingMinutes'\)\)")
